campus.example: She spends most of her time on campus studying and attending classes.
campus.example_cn: 她大部分时间都在校园里学习和上课。

good.example: She is a good student who always finishes her homework on time.
good.example_cn: 她是一个好学生，总是按时完成作业。

chair.example: She sat down in the chair and began reading.
chair.example_cn: 她坐到椅子上开始阅读。

paper.example: She wrote her research paper in two weeks.
paper.example_cn: 她在两周内完成了她的研究论文。

code.example: The programmer wrote a new code to fix the bug.
code.example_cn: 这位程序员编写了一段新代码来修复这个漏洞。
